client_id.description: Criteo Marketing Solutions API client ID (OAuth2 client-credentials). Never logged.

client_secret.description: Criteo Marketing Solutions API client secret (OAuth2 client-credentials). Never logged.

base_url.description: Criteo API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: OAuth2 token endpoint override; defaults to <base_url>/oauth2/token (legacy derives this from base_url at runtime, but the engine's default materialization is a fixed literal, not a base_url-derived one - see docs.md Known limits).

start_date.description: Statistics report lower-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD), sent as the report's startDate filter.

end_date.description: Statistics report upper-bound date (YYYY-MM-DD), sent as the report's endDate filter.

currency.description: Statistics report currency filter (e.g. USD, EUR); also used to stamp the fixture-mode Currency field on other streams.
